description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with a dramatic, asymmetrical roofline and a mix of materials including stone, wood, and glass. The front facade showcases a prominent covered porch supported by stone columns, with large windows providing ample natural light. The rear of the house is dominated by a tall, slanted roof and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, likely offering panoramic views. The exterior is set on a raised platform with visible steps and multiple entry points, and the landscaping includes several tree stumps, suggesting a recently cleared lot. The house has a combination of horizontal and vertical siding, with a muted color palette of dark green, gray, and natural stone. The overall structure appears spacious, with multiple stories and a wraparound deck or balcony on one side.
description: A modern house with an asymmetrical slanted roof, large windows, stone columns, and a mix of wood and stone siding, set on a raised platform with a wraparound deck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, stone columns, and a prominent slanted roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the horizontal siding, secondary entry, and the raised platform with steps.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and the dramatic slanted roof, with visible tree stumps in the yard.
description_view_3: Side/rear view showing the wraparound deck, multiple windows, and a secondary entrance with steps.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with stone columns, steps, and an overhanging roof.
